scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter web dev" "uv run --project services/api uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir services/api --reload --port 8000"
scripts.dev:api: uv run --project services/api uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir services/api --reload --port 8000
scripts.ci:verify: pnpm test:api && pnpm test:web && pnpm build:web
